name: Terrainbound
mission: The long trail shelter — routes, weather windows, turnaround ethics, and journals that honor turning back. Endurance with humility.
learnToday: Planning a weather window: when to start, when to turn around
The turnaround question: what conditions would make you descend?
Packing as field craft — what evidence do you need vs what weight you carry
Trail journal entries that record decisions, not just miles
comingSoon: Route planning with elevation gain and aspect exposure
Weather window checklist for long day hikes
Turnaround ethics card — written before you leave
Private trail journal with photograph evidence
Conservation notes: staying on trail, leave no trace on ridges

preview.title: The long day
preview.placeholderHint: Route · weather window · turnaround time · notes
preview.description: Terrainbound is for hikers who measure success by what they learned, not how far they went. Plan the day, write your turnaround time before you start, and come home with a journal entry — even if the summit waited for another season.
